title: Hooligan BMX Radical Rick Figure
issue_title: The Cast Steps Off the Page
creator_display: Hooligan BMX; Radical Rick created by Damian X. Fulton
alt: Packaged custom Radical Rick figure on illustrated character card art.
summary: A packaged custom figure translating Radical Rick from the comic page into a physical collectible. The supplied artifact photograph preserves the figure, blister packaging, card art and visible creator branding as one object.
provenance: Current Lititz BMX holding; acquisition details were not supplied in the artifact entry.
claims: No edition size, production date or material description was supplied; those fields remain unverified.
details: Figure remains photographed in custom blister-card packaging.
Card identifies Hooligan BMX as the custom-art-figure source.
Card artwork and character identity connect the object to Damian Fulton’s Radical Rick.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
